bash -c cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/src/tests && ./test_gpu.sh /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/build-gfx1100/src/metaeuk minus_strand minus_strand_results_gpu -1 0 && ./test_gpu.sh /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/build-gfx1100/src/metaeuk multi_exon multi_exon_results_gpu -1 0 && ./test_gpu.sh /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/build-gfx1100/src/metaeuk two_contigs two_contigs_results_gpu -1 0 && ./test_gpu.sh /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/build-gfx1100/src/metaeuk target_overlap target_overlap_results_gpu -3 0 && ./test_gpu.sh /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/build-gfx1100/src/metaeuk cluster_rep cluster_rep_results_gpu -3 0 && ./test_gpu.sh /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/build-gfx1100/src/metaeuk target_cov target_cov_results_gpu -1 0.7

bash -c 
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/src/tests
METAEUK=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/metaeuk/build/src/metaeuk

run_gpu_test() {
    local datapath=$1
    local resultpath=$2
    local gapextend=$3
    local mintargetcov=$4
    
    rm -rf "${resultpath}"
    mkdir -p "${resultpath}"
    "${METAEUK}" createdb "${datapath}/contigs.fna" "${resultpath}/contigs" --dbtype 2
    "${METAEUK}" createdb "${datapath}/proteins.faa" "${resultpath}/proteins" --dbtype 1
    "${METAEUK}" predictexons "${resultpath}/contigs" "${resultpath}/proteins" "${resultpath}/predEx" "${resultpath}/tempFolder" --set-gap-extend "${gapextend}" --metaeuk-tcov "${mintargetcov}" --gpu 1
    "${METAEUK}" unitesetstofasta "${resultpath}/contigs" "${resultpath}/proteins" "${resultpath}/predEx" "${resultpath}/predExFlat"
    "${METAEUK}" reduceredundancy "${resultpath}/predEx" "${resultpath}/predRed" "${resultpath}/predClust"
    "${METAEUK}" unitesetstofasta "${resultpath}/contigs" "${resultpath}/proteins" "${resultpath}/predRed" "${resultpath}/predRedFlat"
    "${METAEUK}" groupstoacc "${resultpath}/contigs" "${resultpath}/proteins" "${resultpath}/predClust" "${resultpath}/predClust.tsv"
    perl compare_fasta_results.pl "${resultpath}/predExFlat.fas" "${resultpath}/predRedFlat.fas" "${datapath}/as_should_final_united_exons_aa.fas" "${datapath}/as_should_final_grouped_predictions_rep.fas"
}

run_gpu_test minus_strand minus_strand_results_gpu -1 0
run_gpu_test multi_exon multi_exon_results_gpu -1 0
run_gpu_test two_contigs two_contigs_results_gpu -1 0
run_gpu_test target_overlap target_overlap_results_gpu -3 0
run_gpu_test cluster_rep cluster_rep_results_gpu -3 0
run_gpu_test target_cov target_cov_results_gpu -1 0.7
echo 'ALL GPU TESTS DONE'
